source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 实数 $x, y, k$ 满足 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x+y-3 \geq 0, \\ x-y+1 \geq 0, z=x^{2}+y^{2} \text {, 若 } z \text { 的最大值为 } 13 \text {, 则 } k \text { 的值为 ( ) } \\ x \leq k,\end{array}\right.$
